title: Grilled Monkfish Skewers with Croatian Salsa
description: A flavorful and light seafood dish featuring grilled monkfish skewers served with a fresh and tangy Croatian-inspired salsa.
instructions: 2. Thread monkfish, leeks, red bell pepper, and red onion onto skewers.
3. Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
4. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until monkfish is cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, prepare Croatian salsa by combining chopped red onion, parsley, dill, garlic, and lemon juice in a bowl.
6. Serve grilled skewers with Croatian salsa on the side.
7. Garnish with additional parsley and lemon wedges, if desired.
